scripts.db:reset: docker compose --env-file ./infra/.env -f ./infra/docker-compose.yml down -v && rm -f infra/.env packages/api/.env
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir packages/types exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir packages/utils exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir packages/api exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir packages/sdk exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
